parsed_review.summary: CP00-238 (RP07 Search OCR And Index; risk_class C; 150 units; RP07.P01.M06.S05–RP07.P02.M02.S22) is internally consistent and the pack-level production_ready claim is correctly NOT asserted. (1) production_ready is FALSE across command-evidence.json and manifest.json (status "implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout" / "implemented_pending_review"); the Hermes packet's production_ready_candidate=true denotes only descriptor verification (coverage.valid && foundation.valid via validators.js), not runtime readiness. All gate commands (node --check x5, node --test, rp05/rp06/rp07 + plan/weighted/spec/goal/fullplan validators, npm test/validate/build, git diff --check) exit 0; no_real_data=true; writes_product_state=false; all *_runtime and *_leak guards false. Distributions sum to 150 and match the prompt exactly (deliverable, micro-title, phase P01:88/P02:62, micro-phase counts). (2) Review-hardening (CP178+) is satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit_code 0, stdout_bytes 1444, valid JSON {ok:true}), review_attempt_counted=false, the registry forbidden_review_evidence list enumerates the rejection criteria (auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, disabled tools, missing raw-output ref, missing source-inspection basis, claude final-approval claim, source-mutation claim, production enterprise-trust claim), and no forbidden evidence is present; invalid_attempts_preserved=[]. (3) Claude is read-only and explicitly NOT final approver everywhere (review-request read_only=true tools Read/Grep/Glob; gate C07; service/descriptor authority_boundary claude_is_final_approval=false with human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; manifest claude_not_final_approver=true; enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true). (4) Hermes (gate H07) is used only for deterministic review-packet/receipt handling — hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false, no Hermes runtime receipts, evidence packet is descriptor-only. Changed-file scope is clean: the 8 active implementation refs are consistent (registry/service/validators/index/test/contract/validator script/README all bind CP00-238, upstream CP00-237, next CP00-239 at RP07.P02.M03.S01), and unrelated dirty files (the v2.0 .docx and docs/{enterprise-v2-loop-roadmap,ldip-integration,loop-system-integration,spec-v2-integration}) are correctly preserved/excluded from this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Note: Claude is an independent read-only reviewer; pack and enterprise-trust closure require human final approval outside this receipt.
